name: Features
texts: Everything you needBuilt for how you actually workEvery feature is designed with the working professional in mind. Simple to start, powerful when you need it.Time TrackingLog every minute automatically with one tap. Start and stop shifts with precision timing and never lose a billable hour again.Learn moreSalary CalculatorReal-time earnings based on your hourly rate and hours worked. Set custom rates, deductions, and see your exact take-home pay.Learn moreAnalytics DashboardWeekly, monthly, and yearly stats at a glance. Visualize your work patterns, peak hours, and income trends over time.Learn moreOvertime DetectionAutomatic alerts when approaching overtime limits. Stay compliant with labor laws and maximize your overtime pay rates.Learn moreGoogle Calendar SyncAll shifts synced seamlessly to your Google Calendar. Share schedules with your team and keep everything in one place.Learn moreCloud SyncAccess your data from any device, instantly. Your shifts, earnings, and settings are always up-to-date across all platforms.Learn more
